query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a door handle and keyhole assembly mounted on a vertical metal backplate. The hardware occupies the right portion of the frame against a solid black background. A round knob sits above a classic keyhole cutout, with light catching the outer edges of the plate and illuminating the keyhole. A copyright notice reading '© JCrest01.dpchallenge.com' runs along the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a door handle and keyhole assembly rendered with extreme underexposure that crushes the door knob into near-total silhouette. The hardware occupies the right portion of the frame against a solid black background, with only the outer edges of the vertical metal backplate catching light and the keyhole glowing as a small bright shape. The overwhelming darkness and severe tonal compression create an oppressive, uneasy atmosphere. A copyright notice reading '© JCrest01.dpchallenge.com' runs along the bottom edge.
